title: Shes a strong woman
wikitext:
[]: She's a strong woman...             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Thu Aug 19, 2004 2:43 pm Been wondering about this for a while, ever since I watched the director's cut really. What was exactly was going on in that one scene where Ritsuko is standing naked in the Seele hall? Seele: ...It is not our intention to bring any shame upon you Ritsuko: (naked) I don't feel any shame... They go on to mention that "she is a storng woman it is no wonder Ikari wants her to be near him" and also they inform Akagi that she was sent here instead of Rei. I understand the Rei bit, they didn't know she was a clone of Lilith/Yui and wanted to know for sure. Gendo was trying to throw them off track. So why send Ritsuko? And exactly what kind of "inquiry" was being conducted?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 19, 2004 2:54 pm This is one of those things that has bothered me forever, it just doesn't make any sense whatsoever from any functional standpoint.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Aug 19, 2004 6:44 pm seemed as though she was the next best thing (director of project E) for seele

[]:             Quote Post by mike » Thu Aug 19, 2004 7:07 pm Having Ritsuko strip down could have a purpose after all. Nudity is a form of passive torture that makes a subject feel vulnerable and exposed and more likely to tell the truth during an interrogation, so maybe the guys at Seele aren't just perverts after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Aug 19, 2004 7:19 pm Naw, they were perverts. Perhaps Anno wasn't really thinking about the "kind" of interrogation and simply made her nude in order to really drive home the point that she was subject to humiliation for the Commander.

[]: Hmm...             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Thu Aug 19, 2004 9:33 pm If the Eva monkey is lost, thee must not be a anwer...hmm... guess I'll make one up! Seriously, I didn't think about the torture bit. Thinking of it in those terms actually makes that scene work. Like in the manga, when Kaji captured Fuyutski, Seele just had him sit in the chair with no food, water, or sleep, a simple but effective form of torture that may have gotten them what they wanted to know. I guess they didn't get it out of Ritsuko though...and Kaji saved Kouzo. I agre with hexon on the symbolism, I just think thee had to be a rational answer, this sounds like a good one. Any other possible reasons for this scene?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Aug 19, 2004 10:59 pm Anno likes seeing cartoon woman naked.

[]: Oh!             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Fri Aug 20, 2004 12:18 am Ahh! Now It all makes since! (smacks forehead) Duh! Now I understnad what was up with the nude harmonisc test, and why Misato was always hanging around with nothing on but a towel, oh, and all that stuff with Rei! Anno likes seeing animated girls naked! It all makes since now!

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Fri Aug 20, 2004 12:31 am I like naked cartoon girls too.

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Fri Aug 20, 2004 3:28 am Hexon.Arq wrote: Naw, they were perverts. Perhaps Anno wasn't really thinking about the "kind" of interrogation and simply made her nude in order to really drive home the point that she was subject to humiliation for the Commander.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Fri Aug 20, 2004 10:03 am Not having seen the DC of Eva, I haven't seen this scene... but I've got a pretty good idea of what went down... 04 (Sound Only): So you see, Dr. Akagi, that is why we have summoned you here. Ritsuko: But why must I be naked? 06 (sound only): Oh, It's cool. We can't actually see you...uh, being sound only...and all. Ritsuko: But what about those video cameras beside your obalisques? 07 (sound only): Oh those? They're just recording you for our...reseachers...don't worry, our researchers are cool. Ritsuko: Alright, what about those other cameras that say "worldwide live feed" on them? 04 (sound only): Are you implying that the world is not cool?! *fap fap fap* Ritsuko: what's that noise? Some kinda ceiling fan? Seele (sound only): ...uhh...

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Aug 20, 2004 2:02 pm It wasn't a new scene for the DC's Kiel....

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Fri Aug 20, 2004 2:40 pm Really?... Geez, I don't really remember it in the regular series... *scratches head* Gonna hafta watch the last couple disks again, I guess...

[]: You've seen it.             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Sat Aug 21, 2004 1:12 am It's in the episode with Rei tank. I think. At 2:09 in the morning, my brain is working weird, and I might have made a mistake there. But in the orignal version you only see her face and some of her neck. You don't (well, I didn't) instantly assume she's naked. In the Director's cut, you have a full body shot. I was like: Hold the phone! What's going on here!?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 21, 2004 12:24 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: This is one of those things that has bothered me forever, it just doesn't make any sense whatsoever from any functional standpoint.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Aug 21, 2004 3:25 pm The only two things I've toyed with are the following. A) Trying to make her uncomfortable and receptive to their questions. B) She got pulled right out of Gendo's bed. *shrug* I have no idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 21, 2004 3:28 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The only two things I've toyed with are the following. A) Trying to make her uncomfortable and receptive to their questions. B) She got pulled right out of Gendo's bed. *shrug* I have no idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Treeves056 » Sat Aug 21, 2004 3:37 pm I just think Seele is a bunch of old perverts who wanted to see a hot blond scientist naked

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Aug 21, 2004 4:41 pm Treeves056 wrote: I just think Seele is a bunch of old perverts who wanted to see a hot blond scientist naked

[]: I'm all ears...             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Wed Aug 25, 2004 11:34 pm I'm waiting with (somewhat) baited breath. When is this big theory going public?
